makeup.title: Professional & Bridal Makeup
makeup.description: Flawless, radiant bridal and party looks tailored to your personality. Walk down the aisle or attend any event with absolute confidence and grace.
makeup.benefits: We use premium international brands to ensure your makeup lasts all day, feels lightweight, and looks incredible both in-person and on camera.
makeup.introQuote: Unleash Your Inner Beauty with Our Makeup Services!

subServices.title: Bridal Makeup
subServices.description: Along with the shining jeweler and gorgeous wedding dress the makeup.

subServices.title: Party makeup
subServices.description: Everyone wants to look good, especially when it is the time to party.

subServices.title: Day makeup
subServices.description: The purpose of daytime makeup is often to highlight natural features and conceal flaws and blemishes.

subServices.title: Evening makeup
subServices.description: This can be more dramatic, especially if you are attending a party or function where the lights will be dim.

subServices.title: Night Makeup
subServices.description: When doing your makeup for an evening look, most makeup artists recommend that you choose either your lips or your eyes as the focus.

subServices.title: Skin Treatment
subServices.description: Healthy skin, healthy soul, let your inner radiance take control.

hair-color-style.title: Hair Coloring & Styling
hair-color-style.description: Express your unique personality with our vibrant, professional hair coloring and styling services. Whether you want a subtle change or a bold transformation, our experts deliver stunning results.
hair-color-style.benefits: We use ammonia-free and advanced conditioning colors that not only give you the perfect shade but also protect and nourish your hair.

hair-straightening-keratin.title: Hair Straightening & Keratin
hair-straightening-keratin.description: Transform frizzy, unmanageable hair into smooth, silky, and straight locks holding natural shine. Our treatments strengthen hair from within.
hair-straightening-keratin.benefits: Restores lost protein in your hair, dramatically reduces frizz, and cuts down your daily styling time.

hair-cuts.title: Precision Hair Cuts
hair-cuts.description: From timeless elegance to modern trends, our expert stylists consult and craft the perfect haircut that frames your face and matches your lifestyle.
hair-cuts.benefits: A professionally tailored haircut enhances your facial features and promotes healthier hair growth by removing damaged ends.

hair-extension.title: Premium Hair Extensions
hair-extension.description: Instantly add volume and length to your hair with our natural-looking, high-quality hair extensions fitted seamlessly by our specialists.
hair-extension.benefits: Achieve your dream hair instantly without waiting for it to grow. 100% human hair options available for natural styling and coloring.

facial.title: Rejuvenating Facials
facial.description: Advanced skincare treatments designed to deeply cleanse, exfoliate, and nourish your skin. Restore your natural, youthful glow.
facial.benefits: Improves skin texture, reduces blemishes and pigmentation, boosts circulation, and provides ultimate relaxation.

nails.title: Nail Art & Care
nails.description: Pamper your hands and feet with our luxurious manicure, pedicure, and stunning nail art services. Make every detail count.
nails.benefits: Keep your nails healthy and polished for weeks. A perfect way to relieve stress and complete your overall look.

hair-removal.title: Painless Hair Removal
hair-removal.description: Experience smooth, flawless skin with our hygienic and gentle hair removal services, including waxing and threading.
hair-removal.benefits: Enjoy longer-lasting smoothness compared to shaving, with reduced ingrown hairs and slower regrowth.

skin-whitening.title: Skin Brightening & Whitening
skin-whitening.description: Safe, dermatologist-approved treatments to even out your skin tone, reduce tan, and bring forward a luminous, radiant complexion.
skin-whitening.benefits: Lightens sun-tan, diminishes dark spots, and revitalizes dull skin to give you a fresh, luminous glow.
